name: @forgeax/app-learn-render-1-getting-started-3-shaders

forgeax._smokeInvocationReason: OOS-10 / D-7: smoke gate subset is textures + camera only; 1.3 shaders covered by vitest browser e2e in M7 milestone.

bundle-size.reason: vite app bundle (dist/assets) shape is downstream of @forgeax/engine-runtime + @forgeax/engine-shader sizes already tracked at the package level

fps.reason: OOS-11 fps anchor stays on hello-triangle; per-app fps drift is not gated for learn-render examples

bench.reason: pixel-parity bench drives parity-forgeax vs parity-threejs; learn-render entries land as bench:pixel-parity 7-entry placeholders only

gate.reason: smoke gate subset = 4.textures + 7.camera only (D-7); 1.3 shaders covered by vitest browser e2e (AC-05) in M7 milestone

spike-report.reason: not a spike app; baseline LearnOpenGL section-1.3 placeholder example
